data.content: Shipment review blocked: commit 63c9ce7d5059 is on origin/main and tagged, and the shipped help colorization is present on main, but GitHub Actions Changesets runs 22960783522 (this commit) and 22960997723 (current origin/main) both fail with 'There is no .changeset directory in this project'. CI and Coverage Badge succeed, but the CI/CD pipeline is not fully green, so shipment cannot be approved from shipment_review.
